nasb.text: Laban said, “This heap is a witness between you and me this day.” Therefore it was named Galeed,

esv.text: Laban said, “This heap is a witness between you and me today.” Therefore he named it Galeed,

cnv.text: 拉班說：“今天這堆石頭是你我之間的證據。”因此它名叫迦累得，

ccb.text: 拉班说：“今日，这石堆是你我之间的凭证。”因此，那地方名叫迦累得，

csbs.text: 拉班说：“今日，这石堆就是你我之间的见证。”因此，这石堆名叫迦累得，
